# Architecture — Mission Built MCP Server (The Loadout)
*Generated by tech-lead-review · 2026-05-17*

## Data and Token Flow

```mermaid
flowchart TD
    subgraph Client["MCP Client (Claude Code / Claude Desktop)"]
        CC[Claude Agent]
    end

    subgraph CF["Cloudflare Worker — mcp.missionbuilt.io"]
        direction TB
        OA[OAuthProvider\n@cloudflare/workers-oauth-provider]
        AH[authHandler\nsrc/auth.ts]
        MCP[MissionBuiltMCP\nMcpAgent · src/index.ts]

        subgraph Public["Public Routes (no auth)"]
            LAND["/ — Landing page"]
            PREV["/preview — Warmup walkthrough"]
            HEALTH["/health — JSON status"]
            BCSS["/brand.css — Design CSS"]
            ASHELL["/approach-shell.js — Approach renderer IIFE\nCache-Control: public 1h · CORS: *"]
            SSHELL["/spotter-shell.js — Spotter renderer IIFE\nCache-Control: public 1h · CORS: *"]
        end

        subgraph OAuthFlow["OAuth Flow"]
            AUTH["/authorize — Google redirect"]
            GCB["/google/callback — Token exchange"]
            TOKEN["/token — MCP token exchange"]
            REG["/register — Dynamic client reg"]
        end

        subgraph MCPTools["Protected MCP Tools — /sse (Bearer token)"]
            direction TB
            SHARED["Shared\nloadout_whoami\nloadout_get_brand_css"]
            WARMUP["The Warmup\nwarmup_get_skill · warmup_list_modes\nwarmup_get_template · warmup_setup\nwarmup_run · warmup_config"]
            SPOTTER["The Spotter\nspotter_get_skill · spotter_list_areas\nspotter_get_examples · spotter_get_template\nspotter_review · spotter_build\nspotter_iterate · spotter_get_calibration_epic\nspotter_get_calibration_epics"]
            APPROACH["The Approach\napproach_get_skill\napproach_get_template (deprecated)\napproach_run"]
        end
    end

    subgraph KV["Cloudflare KV — OAUTH_KV"]
        KVS["pending_auth:{uuid}\nTTL: 5 min\nOAuth state during auth flow"]
    end

    subgraph DO["Cloudflare Durable Object — MCP_OBJECT"]
        DOS["MissionBuiltMCP instance\nSSE session + UserProps"]
    end

    subgraph Google["Google OAuth 2.0"]
        GAUTH["accounts.google.com/o/oauth2/v2/auth"]
        GTOK["oauth2.googleapis.com/token"]
        GUSER["www.googleapis.com/oauth2/v2/userinfo"]
    end

    subgraph Bundle["Build-time Bundles (Wrangler text imports)"]
        SMD["WARMUP SKILL.md ~90KB"]
        STMPL["warmup-template.html ~131KB"]
        SPMD["SPOTTER SKILL.md ~29KB"]
        SPEX["area-examples.md ~64KB"]
        SPTMPL["spotter-template.html (deprecated path)"]
        APMPL["approach-template.html (deprecated path)"]
        EP1["synthetic-epic.md"]
        EP23["synthetic-epic-2.md\nsynthetic-epic-3.md"]
        SHELLS["approach-shell.rawjs (~1200 lines)\nspotter-shell.rawjs (~1700 lines)\nBundled as Text; served at runtime"]
    end

    subgraph Artifact["User Workspace — Cowork Artifact"]
        SKEL["~16-line skeleton HTML\n&lt;script id='data'&gt;window.DATA = {...};&lt;/script&gt;\n&lt;script src='mcp.missionbuilt.io/shell.js'&gt;&lt;/script&gt;"]
        SHELL_RT["Shell JS loaded at artifact open time\n(fonts + CSS + HTML structure + renderer)\nCache-Control 1h on CDN"]
    end

    CC -->|"MCP/SSE (OAuth Bearer)"| OA
    OA -->|"Auth check"| MCP
    OA -->|"Public/OAuth routes"| AH

    AH --> Public
    AH --> OAuthFlow

    AUTH -->|"store state UUID"| KVS
    AUTH -->|"redirect"| GAUTH
    GAUTH -->|"code + state"| GCB
    GCB -->|"retrieve + delete state"| KVS
    GCB -->|"exchange code"| GTOK
    GTOK -->|"access_token"| GCB
    GCB -->|"fetch identity"| GUSER
    GUSER -->|"email, name, sub"| GCB
    GCB -->|"completeAuthorization\n→ MCP token"| TOKEN

    MCP -->|"reads props.email, props.name"| SHARED
    Bundle -->|"bundled at deploy"| MCP
    MCPTools -->|"Durable Object SSE session"| DO

    ASHELL -->|"served verbatim"| SHELL_RT
    SSHELL -->|"served verbatim"| SHELL_RT
    SKEL -->|"loads shell at open time"| SHELL_RT
```

## Token / Cost Flow

| Call | Response size | Notes |
|------|--------------|-------|
| `warmup_list_modes`, `spotter_list_areas`, `loadout_whoami` | < 2KB | Safe to call freely |
| `warmup_run`, `warmup_setup`, spotter primers, `approach_run` | ~2KB | Instruction text only |
| `warmup_get_skill(section)` | 5–15KB | Load targeted sections only |
| `spotter_get_skill(section)` | 3–10KB | Load targeted sections only |
| `approach_get_skill(section)` | 2–8KB | Load targeted sections only |
| `spotter_get_examples(area:N)` | ~7KB | One area at a time during review |
| `loadout_get_brand_css` | ~8KB | Once per session |
| `spotter_get_calibration_epic` | ~3KB | Fine |
| **`warmup_get_skill(full)`** | **~90KB** | Avoid — use section params |
| **`warmup_get_template`** | **~131KB** | Path B / first-run only |
| **`spotter_get_examples(area:0)`** | **~64KB** | Avoid mid-review |
| **`spotter_get_calibration_epics`** | **~9KB × 3** | Calibration runs only |
| **`approach/spotter Path B (OLD)`** | **~33K tokens** | Template read — eliminated by remote shell |
| **`approach/spotter Path B (NEW)`** | **~0 tokens** | 16-line skeleton write — remote shell architecture |

**Path A optimization (Warmup):** Agents with a matching `WARMUP_ENGINE_VERSION` skip the full 131KB template reload and instead do a targeted `WARMUP_DATA` script block update (~20 lines). Hot path for daily runs.

**Remote shell architecture (Spotter + Approach):** As of v1.0.6 / Spotter v0.7.0 / Approach v0.1.4, artifact files are ~16-line skeletons. All CSS, HTML structure, and renderer JS are loaded at artifact-open time from `mcp.missionbuilt.io/approach-shell.js` and `mcp.missionbuilt.io/spotter-shell.js`. Path B now costs ~0 agent tokens (was ~33K). Path A unchanged (grep + edit single line). Engine version marker (`<!-- spotter-engine: vX.Y.Z -->`) still drives Path A/B decision; version bump forces skeleton rebuild which generates fresh SPOTTER_DATA.

## Design Notes

**OAuth architecture:** Full OAuth 2.1 PKCE flow via `@cloudflare/workers-oauth-provider`. All state is held in KV with 5-minute TTL (no long-lived server sessions). Auth codes are single-use; KV entry deleted on first read. Google access token is used only to fetch identity and then discarded — not stored.

**Server-side injection (Warmup):** `warmup_get_template` injects agent-supplied JSON into the template server-side before returning the filled HTML. This prevents agents from reconstructing HTML from memory. `spotter_get_template` retains this path for non-Cowork callers.

**Remote shell injection (Spotter + Approach):** Agent writes a 16-line skeleton with `window.SPOTTER_DATA = {...}` and a `<script src="...shell.js">` tag. The shell IIFE executes synchronously after the data script, reads `window.SPOTTER_DATA`, and renders the full UI. No template read; no agent token cost for HTML.

**Prompt injection posture:**
- ✅ `warmup_run` (`config_summary`) — fenced in code block, sliced to 8000 chars
- ✅ `warmup_config` (`source`) — sanitized (strip control chars + non-ASCII, 120-char limit)
- ✅ `warmup_setup` — no user content embedded
- ✅ `spotter_review` (`epic`) — fenced in code block, `.max(20000)` Zod guard
- ✅ `spotter_iterate` (`draft`) — fenced in code block, `.max(20000)` Zod guard
- ⚠️ `spotter_build` (`feature`) — embedded as `**${feature}**` inline, no length guard (Low)

**Build-time bundling:** All skill content (SKILL.md, templates, synthetic epics, shell rawjs files) is bundled at Worker deploy time. Zero runtime fetch cost from the Worker's perspective. Shell rawjs files are served verbatim via public GET routes.

**Shell renderer XSS posture (as of v1.0.6):**
- ✅ Spotter: `esc()` escapes all four chars (`&<>"`); all user data routes through it; `jsEsc()` correctly handles onclick attribute injection
- ⚠️ Approach: `esc()` missing `"` escaping; `f.v` (companyFacts) unescaped; `href` accepts `javascript:` protocol URLs — **requires fixes before shipping** (see open issues below)

**Open issues (flagged by tech-lead-review 2026-05-17):**
1. `approach-shell.rawjs:870,899` — `href` accepts `javascript:` URLs (Critical)
2. `approach-shell.rawjs:843` — `f.v` injected into innerHTML unescaped (Critical)
3. `approach-shell.rawjs:792` — `esc()` missing `"` escaping (High)
4. `approach-shell.rawjs:1099` — `flagged` count uncoerced before innerHTML injection (Medium)
5. `auth.ts:147-165` — Shell routes accept all HTTP methods, not just GET (Medium)

**No rate limiting at Worker level:** `/sse` is OAuth-protected. Public routes are unprotected. Cloudflare-level rate limiting can be configured externally (Workers Rate Limiting API or WAF rules).

**Static CSS:** `brandCss()` computed at module init — no per-request allocation.

**Observability:** No structured logging in TypeScript source. Cloudflare's Worker tail/Logpush is the primary debug surface.

**Version tracking:**
- `SERVER_VERSION` — Worker deploy version (1.0.6)
- `WARMUP_VERSION` — skill version (bump when SKILL.md changes)
- `WARMUP_ENGINE_VERSION` — template engine marker (bump when warmup-template.html changes; drives Path A/B)
- `SPOTTER_VERSION` — Spotter skill version; also the engine version embedded in skeleton comment (0.7.0)
- `THE_APPROACH_VERSION` — Approach skill version (0.1.4)
